payload.description: Co-presenter of M23 Select Bus Service kickoff presentation

Proposed Select Bus Service on 23rd Street in Manhattan, focusing on crosstown bus improvements including dedicated bus lanes, off-board fare collection, all-door boarding, signal priority, and pedestrian safety improvements
payload.lead_agency: New York City Department of Transportation (NYC DOT)

evidence_refs.source_quote: Select Bus Service (SBS) is NYC's brand name for a package of improvements that result in faster and more reliable bus service.
